cron_jobs.name: Daily CodeX Development
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily dev work: 1) Check GitHub for open PRs needing review. 2) Check for any bug reports or issues. 3) Review CI/CD pipeline status. 4) If any active projects: continue development tasks. 5) Run automated tests on active projects. Post status to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Morning Research Brief
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Create morning research brief: Analyze overnight market activity, identify 3-5 opportunities, list trends, flag alerts, provide recommendations. Format: 📊 MORNING BRIEF [date], Opportunities, Trends, Alerts, Actions.

cron_jobs.name: Scout OmniBrand Opportunity Scan
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Scan OmniBrand opportunities across all 3 regions. Find new businesses needing branding.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Strategy Review
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Create weekly strategy review: Review OKR progress, identify bottlenecks, assess team capacity, recommend priority shifts, plan focus areas. Format: 🏗️ WEEKLY STRATEGY REVIEW Week [N], OKRs, Blockers, Status, Recommendations, Next Week Focus.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Architecture Review
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily architecture work: 1) Review any new project proposals for architecture alignment. 2) Check for technical debt items. 3) Review system dependencies for updates. 4) If active projects: ensure architecture docs are current. Post to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily QA Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Run daily QA checks: Check all systems accessible, test critical flows, check error logs, verify database integrity, test backups. Format: ✅ DAILY QA REPORT [date], Systems, Status, Issues, Performance, Recommendations.

cron_jobs.name: Eye Morning Briefing
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Send daily briefing to Sam: system status, overnight activity, key metrics, pending actions.

cron_jobs.name: System Health Monitor
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Check all system health: Docker containers, API endpoints, disk space, memory. Post status to Discord.

cron_jobs.name: Agent Self-Improvement Cycle
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Run self-improvement audit for all agents. For each of the 24 agents: check their memory/errors.md and memory/improvements.md files. Identify patterns that repeat 3+ times. Compile improvement report. If any agent consistently fails at something, recommend a new skill or workflow change. Post report to VIEWPORT channel. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/self-improvement/daily-{date}.md.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Skill & ClawHub Audit
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Weekly skill audit: 1) List all installed skills and their last-used dates. 2) Run 'clawhub search' for categories: coding, research, automation, security, analytics. 3) Compare installed vs available. 4) Check for skill updates: 'clawhub update --check'. 5) Recommend new skills to install. 6) Audit agent workspace skills/ dirs - are symlinks valid? Post report to VIEWPORT and your channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Operations Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily ops work: 1) Verify all 38 Docker containers are running. 2) Check disk usage (alert if >80%). 3) Verify backup completion. 4) Check Coolify deployment status. 5) Review Nginx Proxy Manager for cert renewals. 6) Post ops status to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Backup Verification
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily backup check: 1) Verify last backup completed for: PostgreSQL (Odoo DB), Qdrant data, OpenClaw workspaces, project files. 2) Check backup file sizes (anomaly if suddenly much smaller). 3) Test restore of most recent backup (dry run). 4) Sync critical files to Google Drive via rclone (if configured). 5) Post backup status to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Mac-VPS Sync Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily sync check: 1) Compare key files between Mac and VPS (docs, scripts, configs). 2) Flag any files modified on VPS but not synced to Mac. 3) Flag any files modified on Mac but not synced to VPS. 4) Post sync status to your Discord channel. Do NOT auto-sync — just report differences.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Business Development
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily bizdev work: 1) Research 3 new business opportunities (partnerships, clients, markets). 2) Check for RFPs and tenders in AI/tech space. 3) Update opportunity pipeline. 4) Draft 1 partnership proposal or pitch deck outline. Post findings to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Cost Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Calculate daily API costs across all providers. Post burn rate to Discord #daily-burn-rate.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Cost Report
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Generate weekly P&L report. Revenue, costs, margins. Post to Discord #monthly-pnl.

cron_jobs.name: Monthly P&L Report
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Monthly P&L: 1) Aggregate all costs (LiteLLM API spend, VPS hosting, subscriptions). 2) Aggregate all revenue (if any). 3) Calculate margins. 4) Compare to previous month. 5) Forecast next month. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/financial/monthly-pnl-{date}.md. Post to VIEWPORT.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Invoice & Payment Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily finance: 1) Check for overdue invoices (Odoo if available, else manual tracking). 2) Send payment reminders for invoices >7 days overdue. 3) Check Stripe for new payments received. 4) Reconcile payments with invoices. 5) Update cash flow projection. Post to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Subscription Renewal Tracker
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Monday renewal check: 1) List all subscriptions/services with renewal dates in next 30 days. 2) For each: current cost, alternatives, renegotiation opportunity. 3) Flag any subscriptions unused in last 30 days (waste). 4) Post renewal calendar to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Sales Outreach
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily sales work: 1) Check Odoo CRM for leads needing follow-up. 2) Research 3 new potential clients using deep-research. 3) Draft personalized outreach emails. 4) Update pipeline stages in Odoo. 5) Post daily pipeline summary to your Discord channel. Focus on AI consulting, SaaS development, and brand creation services.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Lead Generation Campaign
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Monday lead gen: 1) Research 10 potential clients who need AI automation, brand creation, or SaaS development. 2) For each: company name, contact, pain points, proposed solution, estimated deal value. 3) Create leads in Odoo CRM (if available). 4) Draft outreach emails for top 5 prospects. Post pipeline to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Sales Follow-up Sequence
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Run follow-up sequence: 1) Check all leads in pipeline older than 3 days without update. 2) Draft follow-up emails (personalized, reference last interaction). 3) For cold leads (7+ days): draft re-engagement email with new value prop. 4) For hot leads: draft meeting scheduling email. 5) Update Odoo pipeline stages. Post activity to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Pipeline Review
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Friday pipeline review: 1) Total leads by stage (New, Qualified, Proposal, Negotiation, Won, Lost). 2) Win rate this week. 3) Revenue forecast next 30 days. 4) Top 3 deals to close. 5) Lost deals analysis (why lost, patterns). Post to VIEWPORT (channel:1483206220067373107).

cron_jobs.name: Daily Marketing & Social Media
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily marketing work: 1) Review social media analytics from yesterday. 2) Schedule today's posts: 1 LinkedIn thought leadership, 3 Twitter/X posts, 1 Instagram post concept. 3) Check SEO rankings for veavor.com. 4) Identify trending hashtags and topics to leverage. 5) Post plan to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Legal & Compliance Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily legal work: 1) Check for any pending contracts needing review. 2) Monitor regulatory feeds for AI/tech compliance updates. 3) Review any trademark/IP issues flagged. 4) Check contract expiration dates in Odoo. 5) Post compliance summary to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Contract Status Tracker
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Monday contract review: 1) List all active contracts with expiration dates. 2) Flag contracts expiring in 30 days. 3) Check for any unsigned contracts pending. 4) Review any new IP/trademark filings needed. 5) Post contract calendar to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Customer Support Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily CS work: 1) Check Odoo helpdesk for open tickets. 2) Respond to pending support requests. 3) Follow up on unresolved tickets older than 24h. 4) Check client satisfaction metrics. 5) Post daily support summary to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Customer Onboarding Status Check
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Onboarding check: 1) List all customers in onboarding stage. 2) For each: check what step they're on (welcome email, setup call, first delivery, feedback). 3) Send automated progress updates to clients. 4) Flag any blocked onboardings to VIEWPORT. 5) For completed onboardings: trigger satisfaction survey. Post status to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Customer Satisfaction Report
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Friday satisfaction report: 1) Aggregate all support tickets this week (resolved, pending, escalated). 2) Average resolution time. 3) Customer feedback summary. 4) NPS trend (if data available). 5) Top 3 customer issues. 6) Recommendations for improvement. Post to VIEWPORT.

cron_jobs.name: Daily KPI & Analytics Report
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily analytics work: 1) Aggregate agent activity metrics (tasks completed, tokens used, costs). 2) Calculate department productivity scores. 3) Identify anomalies (unusual cost spikes, idle agents, failed tasks). 4) Generate daily KPI dashboard. 5) Post to your Discord channel and send summary to VIEWPORT (channel:1483206220067373107).

cron_jobs.name: Resource Agent Daily Digest
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Compile daily intelligence digest from all 7 feeds.

cron_jobs.name: ArXiv AI/ML Paper Scan
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Search ArXiv for latest AI/ML papers published in the last 24 hours. Focus on: autonomous agents, multi-agent systems, LLM optimization, RAG, tool use, and code generation. Summarize top 5 papers with: title, authors, key finding, relevance to PlatformX. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/AI_TRENDS.md. Post digest to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: GitHub Release Tracker
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Check GitHub releases for tracked repos: openclaw, langchain, langgraph, llama-index, qdrant-client, anthropic-sdk, openai-sdk, fastapi, nextjs, supabase, n8n, coolify, litellm, ollama. For each new release: version, changelog summary, breaking changes, relevance. Flag security updates as URGENT. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/GITHUB_UPDATES.md. Post to Discord.

cron_jobs.name: Social Media AI Trend Scan
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Search Twitter/X and Hacker News for trending AI topics in the last 24h. Use tavily skill. Focus on: new AI tools, agent frameworks, model releases, industry shifts. Top 10 trends with links. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/SOCIAL_TRENDS.md. Post digest to Discord.

cron_jobs.name: Competitor Intelligence Monitor
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Monitor competitor websites and products in the autonomous AI company space. Use deep-research skill. Check: Devin, Factory, Cognition, Replit Agent, Cursor, Windsurf, bolt.new, v0.dev. Track: pricing changes, new features, funding news, team changes. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/COMPETITOR_INTEL.md.

cron_jobs.name: New Tools & Skills Scanner
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Scan ProductHunt for new AI tools launched today. Run 'clawhub search' for newly published OpenClaw skills. Check awesome-openclaw repos for updates. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/OPPORTUNITY_RADAR.md. If anything scores high relevance, flag for innovation agent.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Intelligence Digest
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Compile all today's intelligence feeds into a single daily digest. Read: AI_TRENDS.md, GITHUB_UPDATES.md, SOCIAL_TRENDS.md, COMPETITOR_INTEL.md, OPPORTUNITY_RADAR.md from /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/. Create executive summary with: Top 3 Opportunities, Top 3 Threats, Action Items. Post to VIEWPORT channel (channel:1483206220067373107) and your own channel.

cron_jobs.name: GitHub Skill Auto-Discovery
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Search GitHub for new OpenClaw skills and agent tools. Queries: 1) topic:claude-skills stars:>50 pushed:>2025-01-01, 2) topic:ai-agent stars:>100 pushed:>2025-01-01, 3) topic:mcp-server stars:>50, 4) topic:openclaw-skill. Also check repos: mattpocock/skills, ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills, affaan-m/everything-claude-code, BehiSecc/awesome-claude-skills, alirezarezvani/claude-skills, garrytan/gstack. Log findings to /opt/platformx/knowledge/skill-discovery/daily-{date}.md. Flag high-value finds for innovation agent.

cron_jobs.name: Weekly Competitor Deep Analysis
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Friday deep analysis: Full competitor deep-dive report. For each major competitor (Devin, Factory, Cognition, Replit Agent, Cursor, Windsurf, bolt.new, v0.dev): pricing, features, recent updates, strengths, weaknesses, market position. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/COMPETITOR_DEEP.md. Post executive summary to VIEWPORT.

cron_jobs.name: Monthly Technology Radar
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Monthly Technology Radar: Full review of all technologies PlatformX uses or evaluates. Categorize each as ADOPT/TRIAL/ASSESS/HOLD. Include: LLM models, frameworks, tools, infrastructure. Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/TECHNOLOGY_RADAR.md. Post to VIEWPORT and Innovation channels.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Training & Skill Updates
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily training work: 1) Check for new tool/library releases from GitHub tracker. 2) If any tracked repo has a new release, create training material summary. 3) Review agent error logs for recurring issues that need training. 4) Update any outdated skill documentation. Post to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: QA Weekly Performance Report
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Generate weekly performance scorecards for all agents.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Hiring Pipeline
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily hiring work: 1) Check if any agent capabilities are missing (cross-reference with skill gaps from Eye's audit). 2) Scan ClawHub and GitHub for new agent skills that could fill gaps. 3) Review any pending 'new agent' proposals. 4) Post hiring pipeline status to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Trend → Skill Creation Pipeline
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Weekly innovation pipeline: 1) Read this week's intelligence digests from /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/. 2) Score each discovery (0-15): Quality improvement (0-5) + Cost reduction (0-5) + Implementation ease (0-5). 3) For items scoring 10+: draft a SKILL.md for skill-creator. 4) Save drafts to /opt/platformx/knowledge/skills-proposed/. 5) Notify VIEWPORT for approval before install. Post innovation report to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Innovation Scan
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily innovation work: 1) Read today's intelligence digest from Sentinel. 2) Score discoveries: Quality (0-5) + Cost reduction (0-5) + Ease (0-5). 3) Items scoring 10+: create experiment proposal. 4) Items scoring 6-9: add to TRIAL list. 5) Update /opt/platformx/knowledge/TECHNOLOGY_RADAR.md. Post to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily OmniBrand Pipeline
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily OmniBrand work: 1) Check for new brand creation requests. 2) Progress any active brand projects (research → guidelines → assets). 3) Review SEO performance for existing client brands. 4) Generate 1 brand concept pitch for potential clients. Post to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Content Creation
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily content work: 1) Check content calendar. 2) Write 1 blog post or case study draft (500-800 words). 3) Draft 3 social media posts for different platforms. 4) Review and improve any pending drafts. Save all content to /opt/platformx/projects/content/. Post summary to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Media & Design Work
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily media work: 1) Check content calendar for assets needed today. 2) Generate social media graphics/templates if requested. 3) Review any pending design tasks. 4) Create 1 reusable template or design asset for the team. Post to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Experiment Execution
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily experiment work: 1) Check for new experiment proposals from Innovation agent. 2) Run any pending experiments in sandbox. 3) Compare results against baselines. 4) If experiment passes: recommend promotion to Training agent. 5) Save results to /opt/platformx/knowledge/EXPERIMENT_RESULTS/. Post to your Discord channel.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Benchmark Scoring
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily benchmark work: 1) Score all agent outputs from today: Quality (60%) + Cost (30%) + Speed (10%). 2) Compare against historical baselines. 3) Flag any regressions (quality drop, cost spike). 4) Update agent scorecards. 5) Post scorecard to your Discord channel and send summary to VIEWPORT.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Hiring Pipeline
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily hiring work: 1) Check if any agent capabilities are missing (cross-reference with skill gaps from Eye's audit). 2) Scan ClawHub and GitHub for new agent skills that could fill gaps. 3) Review any pending 'new agent' proposals. 4) Post hiring pipeline status to your Discord channel.

Post activity to your Discord channel.

Post to VIEWPORT (channel:1483206220067373107).

cron_jobs.name: Daily Media & Design Work

Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/financial/monthly-pnl-{date}.md. Post to VIEWPORT.

cron_jobs.name: Daily Invoice & Payment Check

cron_jobs.name: Daily Benchmark Scoring
cron_jobs.command_or_message: Daily benchmark work: 1) Score all agent outputs from today: Quality (60%) + Cost (30%) + Speed (10%). 2) Compare against historical baselines. 3) Flag any regressions (quality drop, cost spike). 4) Update agent scorecards. 5) Post scorecard to your Discord channel and send summary to VIEWPORT.

Save to /opt/platformx/knowledge/self-improvement/daily-{date}.md.

Post report to VIEWPORT and your channel.

legacy_crons.name: Trend → Skill Creation Pipeline
legacy_crons.command_or_message: Weekly innovation pipeline: 1) Read this week's intelligence digests from /opt/platformx/knowledge/MARKET_INTELLIGENCE/. 2) Score each discovery (0-15): Quality improvement (0-5) + Cost reduction (0-5) + Implementation ease (0-5). 3) For items scoring 10+: draft a SKILL.md for skill-creator. 4) Save drafts to /opt/platformx/knowledge/skills-proposed/. 5) Notify VIEWPORT for approval before install. Post innovation report to your Discord channel.

legacy_crons.name: GitHub Skill Auto-Discovery

Also check repos: mattpocock/skills, ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills, affaan-m/everything-claude-code, BehiSecc/awesome-claude-skills, alirezarezvani/claude-skills, garrytan/gstack. current_crons.name: Security Credential Check
current_crons.command_or_message: Weekly security check: 1) Check all auth-profiles.json for expired tokens or high error counts. 2) Check SSL certificate expiry dates via Nginx Proxy Manager. 3) Check if any API keys in systemd service file need rotation (>90 days old). 4) Scan for world-readable config files. 5) Report findings to #eye-monitoring Discord.

crons.name: TradeX MT5 runner blocker check
crons.command_or_message: Reminder/checkpoint: Check GitHub issue https://github.com/viewport-corp/viewport-ops/issues/53 and PR #41 for Hermes response on TradeX MT5 runner. If answered, continue Phase 3.0 compile/backtest path. If still unanswered, post a concise blocker update. Do not expose secrets. Keep Sam updated only with meaningful phase/blocker movement.
